chosen_action.title: Promote workflow composition proof asset into the first-run path

why_this_action.summary: The strongest conversion proof asset already existed but was hidden from the main evaluator path. Surfacing it on the three highest-intent repo/docs entry points improves conversion immediately without overlapping the paused directory and curator lanes.
shared_findings_used: agents/marketing/ADOPTION_FUNNEL_NEXT.md: first-task / proof assets are the highest-priority adoption move
agents/marketing/logs/marketing_workflow_audit_latest.md: same-family directory and curator overlap should stay paused
agents/marketing/logs/market_intelligence_latest.json: keep Codeberg-first CTA and core positioning truths
README.md / START_HERE.md / docs/README.md: public evaluator path review

verification: read back README.md, START_HERE.md, and docs/README.md after edit
result.expected_outcome: More repo visitors reach the workflow-composition proof asset before deciding whether Ralph Workflow is worth trying.
